chunks.title: Wisdom and Folly in Daily Life
chunks.reason: A series of proverbs contrasting the effects of wisdom and folly on individuals and rulers.

chunks.title: The Folly of Excessive Words
chunks.reason: An extended reflection on the uselessness and danger of a fool's many words.

chunks.title: Woe and Blessing for Leadership
chunks.reason: A prophetic contrast between the consequences of poor and good leadership on a nation.

chunks.title: Practical Advice for Living
chunks.reason: Final instructions regarding enjoyment of life and caution in speech before authority.
